en.title: FUD FAQ | A Weekly Community Thread | Week 40

blocks.value: FUD FAQ | A Weekly Community Thread | Week 40
Top Question of the Week
What is some of the most exciting and important updates to pay attention to during the first few weeks of 2022?
Well, we are already diving head first into 2022.. and, some of the major upcoming initiatives include that of;
Realm Runway events
Launch of runway.digitalax.xyz
More Designer Realms to be launched
More Collector and Buy side DAOs to be announced and launched
New Guilds on The DLTA
New ESPA launches
Most Common Repeat Question
Where do you see web3 fashion and the metaverse going in 2022?

Everyone needs protection from the elements, connection to each other, and power tools. Far more than style and status alone, that’s what web3 fashion creates for you, even when it sits passive collecting interest and attraction in your bags.

Because of a quirk in social psychology, story, style, and status drive sales far more than utility, except when that utility is overwhelming and necessary. Even then it must be wrapped in something exciting and different to really sell like the special experience it is.
Fashion is the most special something we wrap ourselves in. Web3 fashion magnifies our power and potential to the max. It’s a revolutionary arms race in style.

The moment when the reality of web3 fashion and the IRL+ web3 metaverse are breaking through to mainstream awareness is happening as we speak. From where we stand it’s obvious that the time to get on the rocket ship of what will happen in web3 fashion and the metaverse in 2022 was yesterday. It will make the growth that we have seen in the last two years in NFTs, DeFi and DAOs look tiny and outdated in comparison.
Top Controversies in the Industry

When will the central control of fetishising web2 corporate simps stop pretending to be pro humanity while behaving like tyrants, thugs and bullies online? Probably when their army of astro-turf bot accounts start getting flagged for the fakes that they are.

The real question is who benefits from all of this abuse? Follow the money. Which corporations and tyrannical governments are behind this terror campaign, against the liberation of humanity from corporate and central control?
Ultimately, for those few that are real people in the crowds of screaming abusers, we’d recommend a quick history lesson about what the Soviets used to call you. TLDR; it translates to useful idiots.
Silly Fails and Trolling
Yep… I think this says it all 😆 suppperrr accurate.
Thanks to web3, the traditional route for VCs and founders flirting with each other can be automated away by decentralised swaps and buy and sell orders.
View all FUD FAQ here.
If you would like a question answered or contribute content to next weeks article please reach out through our DIGITALAX Discord server in #FUD-FAQ channel!

ar.title: FUD FAQ | ثريد مجتمعي اسبوعي | اسبوع 40

blocks.value: FUD FAQ | ثريد مجتمعي اسبوعي | اسبوع 40
Top سؤال من ال اسبوع
What is some من ال most exciting و important تحديثات الى pay attention الى during ال first few weeks من 2022?
Well, we are already diving head first into 2022.. و, some من ال major upcoming initiatives include that من;
فعاليات Realm Runway
Launch من runway.digitalax.xyz
More Designer Realms الى be launched
More Collector و Buy side DAOs الى be announced و launched
جديد Guilds على ال DLTA
جديد ESPA launches
Most Common Repeat سؤال
Where do you see web3 فاشون و ال metaverse going في 2022?

Everyone needs protection من ال elements, connection الى each other, و power tools. Far more than style و status alone, that’s what web3 فاشون creates لـ you, even when it sits passive collecting interest و attraction في your bags.

Because من a quirk في سوشيال psychology, story, style, و status drive sales far more than utility, except when that utility is overwhelming و necessary. Even then it must be wrapped في something exciting و different الى really sell like ال special experience it is.
فاشون is ال most special something we wrap ourselves في. Web3 فاشون magnifies our power و potential الى ال max. It’s a revolutionary arms race في style.

ال moment when ال reality من web3 فاشون و ال IRL+ web3 metaverse are breaking through الى mainstream awareness is happening as we speak. من where we stand it’s obvious that ال time الى get على ال rocket ship من what will happen في web3 فاشون و ال metaverse في 2022 was yesterday. It will make ال growth that we have seen في ال last two years في NFTs, DeFi و DAOs look tiny و outdated في comparison.
Top Controversies في ال Industry

When will ال central control من fetishising web2 corporate simps stop pretending الى be pro humanity while behaving like tyrants, thugs و bullies online? Probably when their army من astro-turf bot accounts start getting flagged لـ ال fakes that they are.

ال real سؤال is who benefits من all من this abuse? Follow ال money. Which corporations و tyrannical governments are behind this terror campaign, against ال liberation من humanity من corporate و central control?
Ultimately, لـ those few that are real people في ال crowds من screaming abusers, we’d recommend a quick history lesson about what ال Soviets used الى call you. TLDR; it translates الى useful idiots.
Silly Fails و Trolling
آه… أظن دي بتقول كل حاجة 😆 دقيقة جدًا.
Thanks الى web3, ال traditional route لـ VCs و founders flirting مع each other can be automated away by decentralised swaps و buy و sell orders.
